title: Senior Doctor - Granules India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Granules India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
